hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$FILE" in */growth-log/*.jsonl) echo "BLOCK: growth-log 직접 Edit 금지. forge.sh log-add를 사용하세요." >&2; exit 1;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$FILE" in */growth-log/*.jsonl) echo "BLOCK: growth-log 직접 Write 금지. forge.sh log-add를 사용하세요." >&2; exit 1;; esac; exit 0'
